mapper.select: SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_like fl WHERE fl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM forum_like fl2 WHERE fl2.post_id = p.id AND fl2.user_id = #{currentUserId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_favorite ff WHERE ff.post_id = p.id) AS favorite_count, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM forum_favorite ff2 WHERE ff2.post_id = p.id AND ff2.user_id = #{currentUserId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.nickname END AS user_nickname, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '' ELSE u.avatar END AS user_avatar, s.name_zh AS school_name FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN school s ON p.school_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_like fl WHERE fl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, 0 AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_favorite ff WHERE ff.post_id = p.id) AS favorite_count, 1 AS favorited, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.nickname END AS user_nickname, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '' ELSE u.avatar END AS user_avatar, s.name_zh AS school_name FROM forum_favorite f INNER JOIN forum_post p ON f.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN school s ON p.school_id = s.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
